title: hieracium jordanii subsp. yvesianum
intro: Hieracium jordanii subsp. yvesianum, also known as a type of Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Hieracium jordanii subsp. yvesianum include its potential to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture for herbal remedies, with some practitioners also using it in salves and topical applications to support skin health.
